draft:
Dear Tina,

Thank you for reaching out. We understand you need Q2 financial information urgently for a call today.

While we are looking into this for you, we do not have a confirmed figure on file at this moment. We will review our records and aim to get this information to you as quickly as possible. Please note that any figures provided will be based on our verified records.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The client's request for specific financial figures was not met because the firm has no recorded amount for this client, necessitating a conservative and non-committal response while emphasizing reliance on verified records.
